title: CreateVersionRequestPayload
description: Request payload for creating a generic xRegistry Version entity. The parent Resource is implicitly created if it doesn't already exist. Create is strictly idempotent: if every field matches the latest Version of the parent Resource (including labels), the latest Version is returned; otherwise a new Version is created.

groupId.description: Group identifier. Uses the default if not specified.

versionId.description: Version identifier of the Version to create. If omitted, the server determines the versionId.

version.description: The attributes of the Version to create.

resourceLabels.description: Queryable Key Value pairs to be added to the parent Resource. The parent Resource is implicitly created if it doesn't already exist.
